languages.text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво подкручивает пистон на бороде.{/n} "Неортодоксальная интерпретация трудов префекта Сагрераса, я бы даже сказал рискованная. Любишь ты ходить по грани, Нунциус".
{n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво подкручивает пистон на бороде.{/n} "Неортодоксальная интерпретация трудов префекта Сагрераса, я бы даже сказал рискованная. Любишь ты ходить по грани, Нунциус".

{n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn retuerce pensativamente un pistón de su barba.{/n} «Me atrevería a decir que se trata de una interpretación poco ortodoxa, incluso peligrosa, de las escrituras del prefecto Sagreras. A Nuncius le encanta hilar fino».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn retuerce pensativamente un pistón de su barba.{/n} «Me atrevería a decir que se trata de una interpretación poco ortodoxa, incluso peligrosa, de las escrituras del prefecto Sagreras. A Nuncius le encanta hilar fino».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡若有所思地拧了拧他胡须上的活塞。{/n}“这种对萨格雷拉斯行政官著作的解读实属另类，甚至称得上危险。你真是喜欢在危险边缘试探啊，努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡若有所思地拧了拧他胡须上的活塞。{/n}“这种对萨格雷拉斯行政官著作的解读实属另类，甚至称得上危险。你真是喜欢在危险边缘试探啊，努恩修斯。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn joue avec un piston de sa barbe d'un air pensif.{/n} « C'est une interprétation peu orthodoxe des écrits du préfet Sagreras, je dois l'avouer. Dangereuse, même. Tu joues avec le feu, Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn joue avec un piston de sa barbe d'un air pensif.{/n} « C'est une interprétation peu orthodoxe des écrits du préfet Sagreras, je dois l'avouer. Dangereuse, même. Tu joues avec le feu, Nuncius. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, düşünceli bir şekilde sakalındaki pistonu çekiştiriyor.{/n} "Prefekt Sagreras'ın yazılarının alışılmışın dışında, hatta tehlikeli diyebileceğim bir yorumu. İnce çizgilerde yürümeyi seviyorsun Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, düşünceli bir şekilde sakalındaki pistonu çekiştiriyor.{/n} "Prefekt Sagreras'ın yazılarının alışılmışın dışında, hatta tehlikeli diyebileceğim bir yorumu. İnce çizgilerde yürümeyi seviyorsun Nuncius."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは考え込むように、ひげのピストンをいじった。{/n}「サグレラス総監の著作の、いささか異端的な――あえて言えば危険なほどの解釈ですね。君は際どい線を渡るのがお好きなようだ、ヌンキウス」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは考え込むように、ひげのピストンをいじった。{/n}「サグレラス総監の著作の、いささか異端的な――あえて言えば危険なほどの解釈ですね。君は際どい線を渡るのがお好きなようだ、ヌンキウス」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn spielt nachdenklich mit dem Kolben in seinem Bart.{/n} "Eine unorthodoxe Interpretation der Schriften von Präfekt Sagrera, möchte ich behaupten, wenn nicht sogar gefährlich. Ihr bewegt Euch auf einem schmalen Grat, Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."
